workplans.title: Beredskapsboka Webapp Implementation Plan
workplans.summary: Build a mobile-first, offline-capable PWA that turns the existing Beredskapsboka Obsidian knowledge bank into fast operational support for Sivilforsvaret before, during, and after incidents.
evidence: Superseded by the comprehensive implementation plan and current repository implementation.
npm run check PASS — 39 test files / 97 tests, next build generated 95 pages.
PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3007 npm run e2e:prod PASS — 9/9 production E2E tests.

workplans.title: Beredskapsboka Comprehensive Implementation Plan
workplans.summary: Build a mobile-first, offline-capable PWA that turns the Obsidian Beredskapsboka knowledge bank into fast, source-backed operational support for Sivilforsvaret personnel before, during, and after incidents.
evidence: npm run check PASS — content build, typecheck, lint, Vitest 97 tests, next build 95 pages.
PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3007 npm run e2e:prod PASS — 9/9 production E2E tests.
Production app includes PWA/offline shell, source-backed cards, mission dashboard, context adapters, local exports, release board, and deploy docs.

workplans.title: Beredskapsboka Comprehensive Review Remediation Plan
workplans.summary: Turn the MVP from a passing prototype into a safer, more operable offline PWA by fixing the highest-value audit findings found in the comprehensive review.
evidence: npm run check PASS after lint, privacy, content validation, offline, E2E build, and route guard remediation.
PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3007 npm run e2e:prod PASS — 9/9 production E2E tests.

tasks.title: Restore lint as a real quality gate
evidence: npm run lint PASS inside npm run check.
tasks.sourceHeading: Task 1: Restore lint as a real quality gate

evidence: tests/security/privacy-boundaries.test.ts PASS inside npm run check.
tasks.sourceHeading: Task 2: Redact local filesystem provenance from generated/public source content

tasks.sourceHeading: Task 4: Precache generated routes for cold offline navigation

workplans.title: Workplan Truth Sync Implementation Plan
workplans.summary: Make Obsidian 20-Workplans and the /release board reflect real plan/task status, evidence, and remaining work instead of showing every historical workplan task as active/planned.
evidence: npm run sync:workplans marker checks PASS — 4/4 workplans parsed with completed historical status and no absolute repo path leak.
npm run check PASS — content build, typecheck, lint, Vitest 39 files / 97 tests, Next build 95 pages.
PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3007 npm run e2e:prod PASS — 9/9 production E2E tests after rebuilding .next.
